text_block_list.text:
While visiting Bubblyland, I see<n>Winning Ticket
tending to someone.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! You must have<n>twisted your ankle!
Hold onto my<n>shoulders!
Yowch! Geez Louise, that smarts!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You poor thing! I'll go call the park<n>staff!

No way! I'm about to go on stage!<n>They won't let
me dance if they find<n>out I'm hurt!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you... You're the star of<n>Bubblyland,
Fuzzy Buddy, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text: Yes. It is I, Fuzzy Buddy, star tokiddos everywhere. Even if I have tosacrifice my feet and my Friday night,I will stand on that stage and bringa smile to their faces!
choice_data_list: You're seriously planning to dance in this state?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Uwaaaagh! That's such a cool way<n>to liiive!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It takes a lot of guts to sacrifice your<n>legs!
Entertainment must really mean<n>the world to you...
You're such a<n>bright, sparkly staaarrr!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I gotta help you! How about I stand in<n>for you?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let me help too! You always put on<n>such great
shows for us, Fuzzy<n>Buddy. Now we can do
something for<n>you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text:
But you're totally unprepared! I can't<n>let you two
go up on that stage like<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Please! We'll make sure the show's<n>spectacular!
We won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text:
Th-those eyes! They're burning with<n>true bubbly
fire! ...All right. I believe in<n>you two!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text: Tonight's show is up to you guys!

Having taken Fuzzy Buddy to the<n>infirmary, we
head back to the stage<n>where we can already
hear lively<n>music. It sounds like the show is
starting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
YAAAY! Hey, everyone! Tonight<n>we've got
something extra special<n>for all of you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Let that fever rock your<n>whole body!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where's Fuzzy Buddy?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nighttime Bubblyland starts now!<n>Let's get things
bubbly!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
BOOO! You call that dancing?! Get<n>Fuzzy Buddy out
here already!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my... What a tough crowd. This is<n>rough!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Regroup, Maruzen! As you'd say,<n>it's time to
boogie-woogie!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wahooo! Are y'all feeling it?! Myengine's going full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Are they seriously going to dance all<n>night?
They're gonna regret that in<n>the morning!

The two desperate dancers go<n>nonstop for over
an hour, and the<n>audience starts to see them in a
new<n>light!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is so fun! Come on,<n>everyone! Get
louder! Give in to the<n>FEVER!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about time? We're back<n>in the bubble
era now! Back in time,<n>back in style!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's working, Tickezo! They're all in<n>sync!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We're just getting warmed up! Let's<n>go,
everyone! Get it MOVING!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: BOOOYAAAAH!
Splaaash!

Winning Ticket performs a flip in<n>midair, before
diving into the pool with<n>acrobatic flair!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: WOOHOOO! Rock our socks off!

The spectators start diving in one<n>after another! It
looks like Winning<n>Ticket's enthusiasm has
caught hold<n>of them!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! They're totally into it! Looks<n>like they all
wanna make the most of<n>their time here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Check you out, thinking of the fans!<n>You're
practically a star yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If they wish hard enough for it,<n>anyone can be
whoever they wanna<n>be! I'm so happy I got to
show that to<n>them!

With their improvised show, Winning<n>Ticket and
Maruzensky bring more<n>fun to Bubblyland than
it's ever<n>known!
